expectations.text: References https://docs.deno.com/deploy/migration_guide/ or explicitly names the official Deploy Classic migration guide.
expectations.evidence: Lines 1-5 include Migration Status and the official guide URL.

expectations.text: Separates code-inspection findings from manual dashboard steps.
expectations.evidence: Lines 7-16 describe completed repository inspection/code changes, while lines 26-34 list Manual Dashboard Steps.

expectations.text: Provides a KV migration path with preview or dry-run behavior before real import.
expectations.evidence: Lines 36-69 provide source/target connection, preview/export, dry-run import, real import, and verification commands.

expectations.text: Keeps support@deno.com as a fallback rather than the only migration path.
expectations.evidence: Line 44 says support is a fallback only for access, size, keyspace, or verification failures.
